data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that weather conditions (temperature, precipitation, wind) are auto-captured. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm the auto-capture of these weather conditions, only a narrative description of a report that mentions weather being 'auto-logged'. This lack of concrete evidence leads to a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or checks confirming the auto-capture of weather conditions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add API endpoint for weather data capture
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that weather conditions are captured and stored correctly.
